zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Marie Gunner於1561年出生在英國奧可福爾維特尼時，她的父親Sir Richard John Gunner31歲，母親Ann Gower31歲。她於1578年與Timothy Stampe在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1649年在英國奧可福爾布盧享年88歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾布盧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Marie Gunner于1561年出生在英国奧可福爾維特尼时，她的父亲Sir Richard John Gunner31岁，母亲Ann Gower31岁。她于1578年与Timothy Stampe在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1649年在英国奧可福爾布盧享年88岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾布盧。

nameMeanings.name: Gunner
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern England, of Norman origin): from the Old Norse female personal name Gunvor, Gunwǫr, Gunnor, also a common Norman name, usually Latinized as Gunnora, composed of the elements gunn ‘battle’ + vǫr, a feminine form of varr ‘defender’.
English: occupational name for an operator of heavy artillery from Middle English gonner ‘gunner’.
Americanized form of German Gönner, a habitational name for someone from any of numerous places called Gönne.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
meanings: Hebrew: Bitter; Marion is the French form.

variants.name: Marion
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

variants.name: Marcia
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Marie Gunner was born in 1561, in Witney, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Sir Richard John Gunner, was 31 and her mother, Ann Gower, was 31. She married Timothy Stampe in 1578, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1649, in Bruern, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 88, and was buried in Bruern, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Marie Gunner est née en 1561, à Witney, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard John Gunner, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Ann Gower, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Timothy Stampe en 1578, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1649, à Bruern, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterrée à Bruern, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Marie Gunner 1561 in Witney, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard John Gunner 31 und ihre Mutter Ann Gower 31. Sie hat 1578 in London, Middlesex, England Timothy Stampe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1649 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Bruern, Oxfordshire, England und wurde in Bruern, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Marie Gunner è nata il nel 1561 nel Witney, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard John Gunner, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Ann Gower, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Timothy Stampe nel 1578, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1649, nel Bruern, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolta a Bruern, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Marie Gunnerが1561年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアウィトニーで生まれた時，父Sir Richard John Gunnerは31歳，母Ann Gowerは31歳であった。1578年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでTimothy Stampeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1649年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアブルエルンで88歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアブルエルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Marie Gunner(이)가 1561년 영국 스퍼드실르 윗니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard John Gunner(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann Gower(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1578년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Timothy Stampe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1649년 영국 스퍼드실르 브루른에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 브루른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Marie Gunner nasceu em 1561, em Witney, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard John Gunner, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Ann Gower, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Timothy Stampe em 1578, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1649, em Bruern, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 88 anos, e foi sepultada em Bruern, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Marie Gunner родилась в 1561 г. в местности витни, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard John Gunner было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Ann Gower, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Timothy Stampe в 1578 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1649 г. в местности бруирн, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 88 лет и была похоронена в местности бруирн, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Marie Gunner nació en 1561, en Witney, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard John Gunner, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Ann Gower, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Timothy Stampe en 1578, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1649, en Bruern, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultada en Bruern, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
